Usage:  circleci logs [<job-number>] [flags]

Flags:
  -b, --branch string    Branch for job inference (default: current branch)
      --jq string        Process values from the response using jq syntax
      --json             Output as JSON
      --last-failed      Fetch logs from the latest failed job on the current branch
      --last-job         Fetch logs from the last completed job on the current branch
      --project string   Project slug (e.g. gh/org/repo); defaults to git remote
      --step string      Filter output to a single step by name
